listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Continuous integration" in Cloud and DevOps.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Automatically building and testing frequent code changes
wrongAnswers: A component that distributes traffic across servers
A record of a request moving through system components
A packaged runtime environment for an application

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Continuous deployment" in Cloud and DevOps.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Automatically releasing validated changes to users
wrongAnswers: Adjusting computing capacity as demand changes
An unplanned service disruption or degradation
A template used to create containers

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Pipeline" in Cloud and DevOps.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An automated sequence of build, test, and release steps
wrongAnswers: Collecting information about system health and behavior
Returning a deployed system to a previous version
Managing deployment and operation of many containers

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Artifact" in Cloud and DevOps.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A built output produced by a software pipeline
wrongAnswers: A numeric measurement collected over time
Rolling out a change to a small group before wider release
Managing infrastructure through versioned configuration files

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Environment variable" in Cloud and DevOps.
